formula: weighted mean: chain_of_custody 0.25, override_completeness 0.20, telemetry_latency 0.15, model_card_currency 0.15, unmanaged_remediation 0.15, statute_mapping 0.10

dimensions.label: Chain-of-custody coverage
dimensions.remediation: Assign an owner to AGT-0246; ensure telemetry beacons emit within 24h.

dimensions.label: Tier-2 override completeness
dimensions.notes: 1/2 soft flags justified (OVR-1042 signed; EVT-88201 pending in MD queue)
dimensions.remediation: Resolve EVT-88201 within the 5-business-day SLA to reach the 95% target.

dimensions.label: Tier-1 telemetry latency SLA
dimensions.remediation: Latency within SLA; continue quarterly stress test.

dimensions.label: Model card currency
dimensions.remediation: Automate model-card regeneration on any base-model or prompt change.

dimensions.label: Unmanaged agent remediation
dimensions.notes: 1 unmanaged agent pending owner assignment (AGT-0246, discovered 2026-07-01)
dimensions.remediation: Assign an accountable owner within 10 business days of discovery.

dimensions.label: Regulator statute mapping
dimensions.notes: Rules mapped to SEC 17a-4, FINRA 2210, SR 11-7, FinCEN CDD
dimensions.remediation: Extend mapping to include EU AI Act Annex III on next release.
